name: Big Bad Fursuit
description: Notes Using your ability will change your skin to the B.B. Wolf skin for 30 seconds, which will reset to the actual skin you have equipped after 30 seconds (with a 30 second cooldown after), or every time you change zones.
effects: Halloween Costume: On ability use, dress up as B.B. Wolf Warrior for 60 seconds! Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your candy-filled meter to activate a secret power! Heart of the Beast: Gain +8 ATT for 60 seconds and send 12 claw attacks for 250-350 damage. Secret Power Cooldown: 180 seconds
